form.formComment: Ran a better race when second behind Blue Rudd at this track last start over 320m (18.46). Has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when second behind Blue Rudd at this track last start over 320m (18.46). Has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 100m mark hampered and came together.
Passing the first turn galloped off the heels.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.25 lengths third (23.20) over 401m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.25 lengths third (23.20) over 401m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (19.29) over 330m at Temora. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when second (19.29) over 330m at Temora. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost momentum on the 1st turn and tailed the field.
Checked when crowded on the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.92) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 4. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (18.92) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Has two successes and three minors from nine starts from box 4. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Found trouble in the run here last time and fell and went for a three-and-a-half months spell. Worth following up here fresh.

formComments.comment: Found trouble in the run here last time and fell and went for a three-and-a-half months spell. Worth following up here fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 622m boxes hampered off the back.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 8 over 320m at this track in a Grade 5. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 8 over 320m at this track in a Grade 5. Can't recommend against this lot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the entrance to home straight came together and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 5.5 lengths win at this track over 320m (18.44) beating Despicable Milo in Grade 5 on March 27. Not keen this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 320m. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Missed the frame when fourth (18.96) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Tough ask and looking to others.

formComments.comment: Missed the frame when fourth (18.96) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Tough ask and looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn was severely hampered and lost significant momentum.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 340m at Bulli beaten 21 lengths (20.80) behind Zipping Ali in a Grade 5 on March 31. Has performed below expectations at her last couple but is capable of far better.
